findings.title: Hardhat V2 still installed
findings.why: Migration to V3 not started or incomplete

findings.title: No hardhat config file found
findings.evidence: Searched: hardhat.config.ts, hardhat.config.mts, hardhat.config.js, hardhat.config.mjs, hardhat.config.cjs
findings.why: Hardhat cannot run without a config file

findings.title: package.json missing "type": "module"
findings.why: Hardhat V3 requires ESM config. Without type:module the config may not load correctly

findings.title: Legacy package: ts-node
findings.why: This package is deprecated or superseded in Hardhat V3
findings.fix: Remove — V3 uses tsx/native TS support
